---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Retro Reader
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Does this fit the project's "zero dependency, no build step" philosophy?

Retro Reader is intentionally a vanilla Node.js app with no npm dependencies, no build step,
and no database. Please describe how your proposal would be implemented within those
constraints (or explain why an exception is warranted).

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
